description: Queue of section expansion tasks for the analyst. Each item references a curmudgeon review that found major weaknesses. The analyst writes complete replacement text, one item per run.

items.target: FOUNDATIONAL: New top-level Scoreboard tab + per-row scoreboard schema extensions (data/wins.json, data/predictions.json, new data/killshots.json). Phase 1 = 15 rows.
items.notes: FOUNDATIONAL MODEL CHANGE per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-FOUNDATIONAL-001. Analyst draft produced 2026-04-20. Decider must (a) route to curmudgeon with REQUIRE_ADVERSARIAL_REVIEW, (b) NOT auto-integrate, (c) create tracking issue, (d) log chg-*.json per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-PIPELINE-ROUTING-001. Hold is in effect until operator posts HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-001. The curmudgeon review is for HUMAN-GROUP CONSUMPTION only; it does NOT by itself authorise integration.
items.completion_notes: Phase 1 draft complete: 15 rows, schema spec, scoreboard tab HTML + intro paragraph copy, two formula-script skeletons (V13 Finsler Sydney-Perth + θ=−lonE) with unit tests, integration-point plan, eight anticipated objections. Status locked to draft_awaiting_human_group_review; HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-FOUNDATIONAL-001 kept status=pending per companion routing HNOTE explicit instruction.

items.target: M1 verification batch — drain four single-line factual/wording corrections from the orphan queue per HNOTE-OPERATOR-DRAIN-M1-ORPHAN-QUEUE-001 (high). Patches data/sections.json (Part 5.0 OTS canary anchor) and data/wins.json (WIN-053 detail_evidence; WIN-062 detail_verdict_text x2). Three additional ISSs OBE'd / verified-valid alongside.
items.notes: Verification-batch EXP delivering 4 narrow text patches plus 3 close-as-OBE/verified resolutions. Curmudgeon Step 8a is welcome to batch-review with sibling verification EXPs.
items.completion_notes: Patches: ISS-1219 (SEC-5.0 anchor `;return false` removal), ISS-1305 (WIN-053 conduction→continuation), ISS-1247 (WIN-062 sourcing-window 1899/1978 anchors), ISS-1248 (WIN-062 pre-registration cross-link). OBE: ISS-1259 (already fixed in WIN-062/058/058b), ISS-1218 (partial-OBE, second-half deferred as deep-attack), ISS-1304 (DOI verified valid via web search). Throughput: 7 of 61 orphans drained this run (within 5-10 target).
